ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: Markdown 编译到保险库中；其他格式通过保存对话框导出。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How [[wikilinks]] in scene bodies are rendered. Display-text is the most common choice for submission manuscripts.
ast.target: 如何处理 ![[embeds]]。V1 会剥离所有嵌入；解析模式保留用于未来的媒体包含版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How ![[embeds]] are handled. V1 strips every embed; resolve mode is reserved for a future media-inclusion release.
ast.target: 场景分隔符（`* * *`、星号、全角星号）是标准化为 `* * *` 还是保留原样。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 项目中的所有场景，按 dbench-order 排序。显式章节列表保留用于未来版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Every scene in the project, sorted by dbench-order. Explicit chapter lists are reserved for a future release.
ast.target: 仅包含状态匹配这些值之一的场景。全部取消勾选则包含所有场景，无论状态如何。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only include scenes whose status matches one of these. Leave all unchecked to include every scene regardless of status.
ast.target: 每行一个 wikilink，例如 `[[Outtake]]`。被排除的场景在状态过滤器运行后会从编译集中移除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: One wikilink per line, e.g. `[[Outtake]]`. Excluded scenes are dropped from the compile set after the status filter runs.
ast.target: 最近一次成功编译的时间戳。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Timestamp of the most recent successful compile.
ast.target: 最近一次编译写入的保险库或绝对路径。重新编译会静默覆盖此路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault or absolute path the most recent compile wrote to. Re-compile overwrites this path silently.
ast.target: 内容与上次编译时快照不同的场景数量，加上新增或删除的场景。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Count of scenes whose content differs from the snapshot taken at the last compile, plus added or removed scenes.
ast.target: 显示在封面页和文档标题中的书名。留空则回退到项目标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Book title shown on the cover page and in the document header. Leave empty to fall back to the project title.
ast.target: 可选的副标题，显示在封面页标题下方。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional subtitle shown beneath the title on the cover page.
ast.target: 显示在封面页和 PDF 文档元数据中的作者姓名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Author name shown on the cover page and in PDF document metadata.
ast.target: 用于任何编译时日期字段的格式（例如，封面页生成日期）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Format used for any compile-time date fields (e.g., the cover-page generation date).
ast.target: 此预设生成的文件格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: File format produced by this preset.
ast.target: 编译文件的保存位置。无论此设置如何，PDF 和 ODT 始终会提示选择磁盘位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where the compiled file is saved. PDF and ODT always prompt for a disk location regardless of this setting.
ast.target: 由 PDF 和 ODT 渲染器使用。Markdown 忽略此字段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used by PDF and ODT renderers. Markdown ignores this field.
ast.target: 在文档开头渲染包含标题、副标题和作者的封面页。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Render a cover page with title, subtitle, and author at the start of the document.
ast.target: 生成按顺序列出场景标题的目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate a table of contents listing scene titles in order.
ast.target: 为每个场景标题添加序号、罗马数字或不添加前缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prefix each scene heading with a sequential number, a roman numeral, or no prefix at all.
ast.target: 遵循场景级别的 dbench-section-break-title 声明。关闭可抑制此编译中的所有分隔符（适用于工作坊变体）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Honor scene-level dbench-section-break-title declarations. Turn off to suppress every break in this compile (useful for workshop variants).

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The scene this sub-scene belongs to.
ast.target: 应用于新子场景的正文模板。默认使用内置模板；自定义模板需要在其前置元数据中包含 `dbench-template-type: sub-scene` 才会显示在此处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Body template applied to the new sub-scene. The default seeds the built-in template; custom templates need `dbench-template-type: sub-scene` in their frontmatter to appear here.
ast.target: 子场景的标题；用作子场景笔记的文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The sub-scene's title; used as the sub-scene note's filename.
ast.target: 在父场景中的位置。留空则添加到末尾。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The project this scene belongs to.
ast.target: 应用于新场景的正文模板。默认使用内置模板；自定义模板需要在其前置元数据中包含 `dbench-template-type: scene` 才会显示在此处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Body template applied to the new scene. The default seeds the built-in template; custom templates need `dbench-template-type: scene` in their frontmatter to appear here.
ast.target: 场景的标题；用作场景笔记的文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The scene's title; used as the scene note's filename.
ast.target: 在故事顺序中的位置。留空则添加到末尾。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Position in story order. Leave blank to add at the end.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of your project. Used as the project note's filename.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder: a folder containing scene notes. Single-scene: one note that is the whole work (flash fiction, poems).
ast.target: 创建项目的位置。{project} 标记会被替换为标题。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 将研究文件夹和其他非手稿顶级文件夹与手稿一起引入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bring in the research folder and other non-manuscript top-level folders alongside the manuscript.
ast.target: 将每个文档的快照作为草稿文件与每个场景一起引入。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Variables: {scene} {title} {date} {date_compact} {time} {n}. Default matches native draft files.

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a starter compile preset so the project has somewhere to begin.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The project this chapter belongs to.
ast.target: 应用于新章节的正文模板。默认使用内置模板；自定义模板需要在其前置元数据中包含 `dbench-template-type: chapter` 才会显示在此处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Body template applied to the new chapter. The default seeds the built-in template; custom templates need `dbench-template-type: chapter` in their frontmatter to appear here.
ast.target: 应用于新章节的正文模板。默认选项会使用内置模板；自定义模板需要在前置信息中包含 `dbench-template-type: chapter` 才会在此处显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The chapter's title; used as the chapter note's filename.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pick the chapter this scene should belong to.
ast.target: 选择此场景应归属的章节。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pick the scene this sub-scene should belong to.
ast.target: 选择此子场景应归属的场景。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Relative to the project folder. Default {chapter}/ nests scenes under their chapter for chapter-aware projects and stays flat for chapter-less ones.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Relative to the parent scene's folder. Default {scene}/ nests sub-scenes next to their parent scene wherever it lives.
ast.target: 相对于父场景的文件夹。默认值 {scene}/ 会将子场景嵌套在其父场景旁边，无论父场景位于何处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where scene templates live. The built-in default template is created here on first project creation if absent.
ast.target: 场景模板存放位置。如果不存在，内置默认模板将在首次创建项目时在此处生成。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 安装命令写入初始 .base 文件的位置。如果文件夹不存在则会创建；现有文件永远不会被覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 每个场景的草稿存储位置。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 草稿文件夹的名称。用于项目本地和整个保险库的放置方式；对于每个场景的放置方式则忽略此设置，其名称从场景标题派生。

ast.source: Markdown file used for new chapters.

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 当文件更改时，实时协调正向和反向引用。在非常大的保险库中禁用此功能以提高性能。

ast.target: 尚未解析项目包 — 请返回上一步。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No manuscript folder found in this bundle. Nothing narrative to import.
ast.target: 在此项目包中未找到手稿文件夹。没有可导入的叙事内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Decide how source statuses, labels, and custom fields land in the new project. To rename or reorder existing statuses, edit your status vocabulary in plugin settings.
ast.target: 决定源状态、标签和自定义字段如何映射到新项目中。要重命名或重新排序现有状态，请在插件设置中编辑您的状态词汇表。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No statuses defined in this project.
ast.target: 此项目中未定义任何状态。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No custom metadata fields defined in this project.
ast.target: 此项目中未定义任何自定义元数据字段。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pick the frontmatter key for each custom field, or drop the field at import.
ast.target: 为每个自定义字段选择前置键，或在导入时丢弃该字段。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Also written to the import errors file in the new project folder.
ast.target: 同时写入新项目文件夹中的导入错误文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No projects exist yet. Create a project first.
ast.target: 尚无项目。请先创建一个项目。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Conflicts need manual review in the note's frontmatter; this action won't change them.
ast.target: 冲突需要在笔记的前置信息中手动审查；此操作不会更改它们。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 适用于 Obsidian 的写作工作流

ast.name: text
ast.source: Draft Bench manages projects, scenes, and versioned drafts as plain Markdown notes, with optional chapter structure for novel-shape projects.
ast.target: Draft Bench 将项目、场景和版本化草稿管理为纯 Markdown 笔记，并为小说类项目提供可选的章节结构。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Compile your manuscript when you're ready to share. Markdown writes back into the vault; other formats export through a save dialog.
ast.target: 准备好分享时，即可编译您的手稿。Markdown 会写回保险库；其他格式则通过保存对话框导出。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This scene’s project has no chapters yet. Create a chapter first via the command palette.
ast.target: 此场景的项目尚无章节。请先通过命令面板创建一个章节。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This sub-scene’s project has no other scenes. Create a scene first via the command palette.
ast.target: 此子场景的项目尚无其他场景。请先通过命令面板创建一个场景。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No other statuses are defined, so rename is not available. Remove will leave the notes with their current value.
ast.target: 没有定义其他状态，因此重命名不可用。移除将保留笔记的当前值。
